title: Throw With Ease
description: This mod adds a keybinding to throw items from your inventory!
body:
[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png)](https://github.com/BertSa/ThrowWithEase) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/throw-with-ease) ![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)
## Description This mod adds a keybinding to throw items from your inventory! To do so you need to go in the modmenu setting and add the item id you want a keybind for (Ex: `minecraft:ender_pearl` or `ender_pearl`). For throwable potions you do the same but with the effect of the potion (Ex: `minecraft:fire_resistance` or `fire_resistance`) ### DISCLAIMER This mod works on the client side only, which can gives you an advantage over other players. I can't guarantee that you won't get banned from public servers when using this mod on them. Use on public servers at your own risk or ask a server admin. ### Credit This mod is based on [NemosFireworkKeybinding](https://github.com/NemoNotFound/NemosFireworkKeybinding) by NemoNotFound ## Dependencies [![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![ClothConfigAPI](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/cloth-config-api_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Modmenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a63b80306b6537b8a55428d107df3f698245cf7c.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
